Strategic
report
From ASML's Annual Report 2025




The separate downloads are an extract from the 2025 Annual Report
based on US GAAP. You are urged to read carefully the 2025 Annual
Report based on US GAAP in its entirety. We also publish an Annual
Report based on EU-IFRS. Both Annual Reports can be found on our
website. The 2025 Annual Report based on US GAAP is also available
on the SEC’s website at http://www.sec.gov.

title: Presentation Investor Relations Q3 2025
summary:
ASML reports €7.5 billion total net sales and €2.1 billion net income in Q3 2025
 Full-year 2025 expected total net sales growth of around 15% with gross margin around 52%

                                                                 Veldhoven, the Netherlands

title: Samsung Electronics
summary:
SAMSUNG
ELECTRONICS



Earnings Presentation:
4Q 2025 Financial Results
 Disclaimer

The financial information in this document are consolidated earnings results based on K-IFRS.

This document is provided for the convenience of investors only before the external audit on our 4Q 2025 financial results is completed.
The Audit outcomes may cause some parts of this document to change.

This document contains "forward-looking statements" - that is statements related to future not past events.
